title: The Elementals - RPG
description: Master the power of the elements in this immersive RPG mod!
body:
# 🔥 The Elementals (RPG Series)

![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/HkPJwSd.png)

![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-2F4858?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)
![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/badge/YouTube-2F4858?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&logoColor=white)
![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-2F4858?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white)
![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-2F4858?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)
![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-2F4858?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)

---

## 🌟 About

**The Elementals (RPG Series)** is a Minecraft mod that introduces powerful elemental abilities into an RPG-style progression system.

Harness the power of:

- 🔥 Fire  
- 🌊 Water  
- ⚡ Electric  
- 🌑 Dark  

Gain abilities, craft elemental artifacts, and become a master of the elements.

---

## ⚔️ Gameplay

### 🔥 Fire Element Progression

**1. Defeat the Fire Golem**
- Found across the Nether  
- Drops **Fire Rune (1% chance)**  

![Fire Golem](https://i.imgur.com/kipoMYc.gif)

---

**2. Craft the Fire Element**

![Crafting](https://i.imgur.com/oL5ECaQ.gif)

---

**3. Consume to Unlock Power**

Unlock the **Fire Element Ability**

![Consume](https://i.imgur.com/sLZjtcn.gif)

---

### ✨ Signature Ability

Use your unlocked ability (configurable keybind):

- Teleports you to projectile impact location  
- Deals damage to enemies  

![Ability](https://i.imgur.com/eGHREtI.gif)

---

### 🧙 Additional Abilities

- Obtain spells from **Cleric Villagers**  
- Trade to unlock new powers  

![Trading](https://i.imgur.com/XSVFy7g.gif)

---
